description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a mix of stone and smooth gray exterior finishes. The front facade includes a prominent arched window above the main entrance, a driveway with two parked cars, and a small landscaped area with circular planters. The structure is two stories tall, with the upper level showcasing large, rectangular windows and a flat roof. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a green lawn and several mature trees, enclosed by a white horizontal slat fence. The side elevation reveals a combination of stone and modern paneling, with the garage and driveway extending alongside the house. The overall layout is rectangular, with clean lines and a blend of natural and contemporary materials.
description: A modern two-story house with stone and gray panel exteriors, large windows, a driveway, and a spacious backyard with trees and a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with an arched window, two cars in the driveway, and circular planters by the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long driveway, garage, and the full expanse of the backyard with a white fence and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard lawn, mature trees, and the back facade with large windows and a flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stone exterior, backyard, and the side of the house with minimal windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with an arched window above the door, stone surround, and small circular planters; no porch or overhang.
